message:
feat(core): add WidthCache perf tests + Bayesian capability evidence ledger

WidthCache (bd-4kq0.6.3): property_cache_equivalence (6 tests),
e2e_cache_replay with JSONL logging (4 tests), perf_cache_overhead
with p95 latency gates (6 tests). All 584 ftui-text tests pass.

Capability Evidence Ledger (bd-4kq0.7.2): CapabilityLedger with
Bayesian log-odds model, evidence_weights module with standard Bayes
factors, build_ledgers() integration with CapabilityProber. 17 tests.

Mock Terminal Harness (bd-4kq0.7.3): MockTerminal structs for
xterm/vt100/mintty/timeout scenarios, probe ordering independence
property tests, JSONL schema validation. 8 E2E tests.

Closes bd-4kq0.6.3, bd-4kq0.6, bd-4kq0.7.1, bd-4kq0.7.2, bd-4kq0.7.3,
bd-4kq0.7, bd-4kq0 (entire Core Kernel Optimization epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
